description: A match_summary inside a GET /contexts/search response whose optional 'summary' field is JSON null. match_summary types 'summary' as a bare string ("type": "string" in acdp-common.schema.json#/$defs/match_summary), NOT as "type": ["string", "null"]. An absent summary MUST be omitted, never serialized as null (RFC-ACDP-0005 §2.2.1). A strict receiver MUST reject 'summary: null' as schema_violation.

expected.rationale: summary is an optional, non-nullable string projection. A context with no producer-supplied summary MUST be serialized with the summary key omitted from the match_summary object, not with summary set to null. Emitting null is non-conformant and a strict receiver treats it as a parse error.
